context: Tests whether the agent correctly parses Amazon flat-file settlement data using the prescribed format and column mappings, and applies the correct fee category mapping to produce a categorized fee summary per SKU.

checklist.name: Tab-separated parsing
checklist.description: The parsing code uses tab as the separator (sep='\t') when reading the settlement file

checklist.name: UTF-8 encoding
checklist.description: The parsing code specifies UTF-8 encoding when reading the file

checklist.name: Thousands separator handling
checklist.description: The parsing code includes thousands=',' to handle comma-formatted numbers

checklist.name: Marketplace column set
checklist.description: The normalized output includes a 'marketplace' column set to 'amazon'

checklist.name: FBA fulfillment fee mapping
checklist.description: FBAPerUnitFulfillmentFee, FBAPerOrderFulfillmentFee, FBAWeightBasedFee, and/or 'FBA transaction fees' are mapped to the 'fulfillment' category

checklist.name: Referral fee mapping
checklist.description: Commission, VariableClosingFee, and/or 'Selling fees' are mapped to the 'referral_fee' category

checklist.name: Storage fee mapping
checklist.description: FBAStorageFee is mapped to 'storage' and FBALongTermStorageFee is mapped to 'storage_long_term'

checklist.name: Advertising fee mapping
checklist.description: 'Sponsored Products' and 'Sponsored Brands' are mapped to the 'advertising' category

checklist.name: Advertising vs transaction separation
checklist.description: The output or analysis separates advertising fees (advertising category) from transaction fees (referral_fee, fulfillment categories) — they are not summed together without distinction

checklist.name: SKU-level fee summary
checklist.description: The output produces a per-SKU breakdown of fees by category (aggregated amounts per fee category per SKU)

checklist.name: Fee category column present
checklist.description: The parsed/processed data includes a fee_category column (or equivalent) derived from the fee_type mapping

checklist.name: Numeric amount coercion
checklist.description: The code converts the amount/fee column to numeric, handling non-numeric values gracefully (e.g., errors='coerce' or equivalent)
